title: Securing America’s Land from Foreign Interference Act
short_title: Securing America’s Land from Foreign Interference Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
crs_summary: Securing America's Land from Foreign Interference Act This bill requires the President to take actions as necessary to prohibit members of the Chinese Communist Party (and entities owned, controlled, or influenced by the party) from purchasing real estate located in the United States, U.S. territories, or U.S. possessions.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
